title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Warden, Accountant and More Posts
shortInfo: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Warden, Accountant and More Posts. Candidates Graduate, B.Ed with Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri official website malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.

basic_details.job_title: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Warden, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 for 17 posts of Warden, Accountant and More Posts. Candidates Graduate, B.Ed with Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri official website malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.details: Warden: BA / BSc + BEd. Minimum 2 years' experience in managing an academic institution. Part Time Teacher (English): BA + B.Ed. Untrained Arts Graduates having English as (Hons.) will be preferred if trained candidates are not available. Candidates secured highest mark in English as subject will be considered if no candidates are available. Part Time Teacher (Math/Science): BSc + B.Ed. Untrained Science Graduates will be considered if trained candidates are not available. Part Time Teacher (Sanskrit): BA with Sanskrit or Sahitya Acharya. Accountant: B.Com with DCA.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies announced for various temporary posts under Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Part Time Teacher posts?
faq.answer: For Part Time Teacher (English) and (Math/Science), a Bachelor's degree with B.Ed. is required. For Part Time Teacher (Sanskrit), a BA with Sanskrit or Sahitya Acharya is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Warden post is between 30 years to 50 years. Specific relaxation details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via Registered Post or Speed Post.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The Accountant post offers a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 16637/- per month, which includes the EPF share.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned for Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the announced posts under Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri Recruitment 2026 is temporary.

faq.question: Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Samagra Shiksha Malkangiri, which is www.malkangiri.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates along with the application form.
